title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXI. Scholastic.
content:
Cross patch,
            Draw the latch,
        Sit by the fire and spin;
            Take a cup,
            And drink it up,
        Then call your neighbours in.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXXI. Scholastic." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
